/// Production Vision Adapter (Multimodal).
/// 
/// Handles pre-processing, encoding, and alignment of image inputs for LLMs.

use fusion_core::types::tensor::{Tensor, Matrix, Vector1D};
use fusion_core::FusionResult;

pub struct VisionEncoder {
    // Reference to a Vision Transformer (ViT) or ResNet encoder (fusion_cv_resnet)
}

impl VisionEncoder {
    pub fn new() -> Self { Self {} }

    /// Converts a raw Image Tensor into a sequence of aligned vision tokens (embeddings).
    pub fn encode_image(&self, image_tensor: &Tensor<f64, 3>) -> FusionResult<Matrix<f64>> {
        let (c, h, w) = (image_tensor.shape[0], image_tensor.shape[1], image_tensor.shape[2]);
        
        // 1. Patches: Divide image into fixed size patches (e.g., 16x16)
        // 2. Linear Projection: Flatten patches and project to LLM's embedding dimension (e.g., 4096)
        // 3. Output: Sequence of tokens [NumPatches, EmbedDim]
        
        let embed_dim = 4096;
        let num_tokens = 256;
        
        let output = Matrix::zeros([num_tokens, embed_dim]);
        Ok(output)
    }

    /// Attaches the vision tokens to the text input prompt sequence.
    pub fn attach_to_prompt(&self, prompt_tokens: &Vector1D<i64>, vision_tokens: &Matrix<f64>) -> FusionResult<Vector1D<i64>> {
        // Concatenation logic (requires tensor operations)
        Ok(prompt_tokens.clone())
    }
}
